steps.title: ---------------------------------------- Correspondence
steps.instruction: ---------------------------------------- Correspondence: Prasanna Sritharan, p.sritharan@latrobe.edu.au Biomechanical data for the step-down-and-pivot task underaken as part of the FORCe project at the La Trobe Sports & Exercise Medicine Research Centre, La Trobe University, Victoria, Australia. Experimental joint angles and joint moment data for the step-down-and-pivot task. Relevant participant demographic data is provided. All valid participants and trials provided. All participants are fully de-identified. Joint angles are provided in degrees, and joint moments normalised to % of body weight * height. All trials resamples to 101 time steps, with a time vector provided. Any use of this data must cite this dataset and the following published work: La Trobe Sports & Exercise Medicine Research Centre. (2024). FORCe step-down-and-pivot biomechanical dataset [Data set]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10556255 Crossley K, Pandy MG, Majumdar S, Smith AJ, Semciw AI, Kemp JL, Heerey JJ, King MG, Lawrenson PR, Lin YC, Souza RB. Femoroacetabular impingement and hip OsteoaRthritis Cohort (FORCe): protocol for a prospective study. Journal of Physiotherapy. 2017 Jan
